candidate_definition_hints.text: C++/Python implementation of Nearest Neighbor Descent for efficient approximate nearest neighbor search

Nearest Neighbor Descent (nndescent) is a C++ implementation of the nearest neighbor descent algorithm, designed for efficient and accurate approximate nearest neighbor search. With seamless integration into Python, it offers a powerful solution for constructing k-nearest neighb…
